                MAX(oi.name) as name,
                COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as orders_count,
                AVG(oi.base_price) as avg_base_price from `order_items` as `oi` inner join `orders` as `o` on `oi`.`order_id` = `o`.`id` where `oi`.`parent_id` is null and `o`.`channel_id` in (1) and `o`.`created_at` between '2026-04-12 00:00:00' and '2026-05-12 09:25:51' group by `oi`.`product_id` having COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) > 0 order by `orders_count` desc limit 10
